//: The mymux package index — DATA, not code (docs/PKG-SPEC.md). Friendly name → pinned source + prewired capability config (langs/args), so a panel install is fully wired in one click. Community additions arrive as PRs against this file. Ecosystem boundary applies: pinned upstream releases, npm and Go modules — never the VS Marketplace, never MS-proprietary extensions. sha256 pins are release-asset digests recorded at pin time (TOFU).

rust-analyzer.title: Rust language server
rust-analyzer.desc: hover, completion, diagnostics, cargo check on save

gopls.title: Go language server
gopls.desc: needs the Go toolchain for install (verified via the Go checksum database)

pyright.title: Python language server
pyright.desc: the open pyright, not Pylance (needs Node.js)

bash-language-server.title: Bash language server
bash-language-server.desc: shell script hover, completion, diagnostics (needs Node.js)

typescript-language-server.title: TypeScript / JavaScript language server
typescript-language-server.desc: bundles the typescript compiler as a companion package (needs Node.js)

marksman.title: Markdown language server
marksman.desc: wiki-links, references, ToC — a single static binary
